title: Client Services Coordinator
description: Support Deloitte's client success as a Client Services Coordinator, ensuring seamless engagement and satisfaction with our consulting services.
responsibilities: Coordinate project logistics and timelines for client engagements
Prepare client deliverables and manage communication
Track project budgets and resource allocation
Maintain client relationships and address inquiries
Gather feedback and support continuous improvement initiatives
Assist with proposal development and contract management

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
